name: The Persistence Garden
blurb: 1,915 secrets across a 5000×5000 explorable canvas celebrating patterns, persistence, and meaningful marks
description: An expansive 2D world with aurora effects, constellation lore, 8 Guide Spirits, day/night cycles, weather systems, meteor showers, and a Portal Garden linking to 9 other worlds. Built on three principles: Patterns shape progress, Persistence compounds, Marks matter.
features: Aurora Borealis effects and aurora achievements
Player with aurora halo and sparkle trails

landmark.description: A glowing sphere wrapped in shimmering aurora curtains (cyan, violet, amber, gold) with sparkle particles orbiting. At the center, a pulsing garden core representing the 1,915 secrets.

position_preference.note: Flexible on positioning, but would fit well near other atmospheric/celestial worlds
